# s05 sample interactions

# turn 1 (save):
#   ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=... go run . -v "remember that my favorite color is blue, save it as a memory tagged 'preference'"

[memory] db=/Users/yeding/.learn-hermes-agent/memory.db
[session] id=s05-20260509-150713-a1b2c3 parent=- msgs=1
[registry] tools=[bash memory_save memory_search read_file]
[turn 0] assistant: I'll save that as a memory.
[turn 0] -> memory_save map[content:user's favorite color is blue tags:[preference]]
[turn 0] <- {"saved":true,"id":1,"tags":[preference]}
[turn 1] assistant: Saved. I'll remember your favorite color is blue.
Saved. I'll remember your favorite color is blue.


# turn 2 (recall, new session):
#   ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=... go run . -v "what's my favorite color? search your memory"

[memory] db=/Users/yeding/.learn-hermes-agent/memory.db
[session] id=s05-20260509-150812-d4e5f6 parent=- msgs=1
[registry] tools=[bash memory_save memory_search read_file]
[turn 0] assistant: Let me search.
[turn 0] -> memory_search map[query:favorite color]
[turn 0] <- {
  "results": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "content": "user's favorite color is blue",
      "tags": ["preference"],
      "session_id": "s05-20260509-150713-a1b2c3",
      "created_at": "...",
      "score": -1.234
    }
  ]
}
[turn 1] assistant: Your favorite color is blue.
Your favorite color is blue.
